notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Byron Buxton singles on a soft ground ball to third baseman Ke'Bryan Hayes. Byron Buxton to 2nd. Byron Buxton advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by third baseman Ke'Bryan Hayes.

notableEvents.label: Dane Myers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dane Myers flies out sharply to center fielder Byron Buxton.

notableEvents.label: Dane Myers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dane Myers walks. Spencer Steer to 3rd. Will Benson to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Eugenio Suárez reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Tristan Gray. Elly De La Cruz scores. Eugenio Suárez to 2nd. Fielding error by left fielder Austin Martin.

notableEvents.label: Eugenio Suárez reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Eugenio Suárez reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Tristan Gray. Elly De La Cruz scores. Eugenio Suárez to 2nd. Fielding error by left fielder Austin Martin.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Elly De La Cruz doubles (5) on a line drive to right fielder James Outman. Elly De La Cruz to 3rd. Elly De La Cruz advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by right fielder James Outman.
